subtitle: in the app
title: Not vaporware. An app you install.
description: See DevSenses in action — 8 syntax themes, streaming diff explanation, adaptive quiz that learns from you.

items.title: 8 syntax themes, your way
items.description: Default, Dracula, Monokai, One Dark, Tokyo Night, Nord, GitHub and Solarized. Switch instantly — the whole app follows.
items.alt: Live preview of DevSenses' 8 syntax highlighting themes

items.title: The diff explained line by line
items.description: Streaming markdown, inline comments anchored to hunks, tabs Summary / Details / Concepts.
items.alt: Side-by-side diff with streaming AI explanation and anchored comment

items.title: Quiz that learns from you
items.description: Post-explanation. Per-concept mastery. 4 levels (Novice → Mastered). Right 5 times? Skipped.

items.title: Grade and issues, instantly
items.description: A toggle runs the review alongside the explanation. 0–10 grade, issues by severity, strengths and suggestions.
items.alt: Code review panel with grade, issues by severity and suggestions
